creator: cs@innolan.dk
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #1)

My intention for adding ONLY_FOR_ARCHS was partly to explicit state approved architectures, and partly to allow pre-build packages as shown on PortsMon:
http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=math&portname=amath

The redefinition of ARCH was due to the variety of arm architectures and inspired by this mail: 
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2015-November/100968.html

If there is a better way to mark specific architectures as approved (and tested) I would be happy to learn about it.
